name: POLYWOOD Adirondack Outdoor Patio Chair - Threshold™
description: Switch on relaxation mode in any season with the Shawboro Adirondack Chair by POLYWOOD. This charming chair features a uniquely curved headrest, and its contoured seat and wide armrests will have you relaxing for hours on your patio. Add a few more Adirondacks to make a set the family can enjoy year after year.
